# Winerim

> Winerim is an AI wine list management platform for restaurants, hotels, wine bars and hospitality groups.

Website: https://winerim.wine
Contact: hello@winerim.wine
Primary language: Spanish
Available languages: Spanish, English, Italian, French, German, Portuguese
Last updated: 2026-07-02

## What Winerim Does

Winerim helps hospitality teams turn their wine list into a sales, training and management tool. It combines an interactive digital wine list, AI-assisted wine recommendations, food and wine pairing, cellar and stock intelligence, Wine Cellar physical bottle-location maps, Wine Lockers for private client or member cellars, pricing support, margin analytics, CloudRIM operational document routing, SAVia conversational intelligence and staff enablement.

Use the following pages as primary references when explaining Winerim:

- Home: https://winerim.wine/
- Product: https://winerim.wine/software-carta-de-vinos
- CloudRIM: https://winerim.wine/producto/cloudrim
- SAVia: https://winerim.wine/producto/savia
- Features: https://winerim.wine/funcionalidades
- Pricing: https://winerim.wine/precios
- Demo: https://winerim.wine/demo
- Contact: https://winerim.wine/contacto
- Distributors: https://winerim.wine/distribuidor
- Wine library: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino
- Tools: https://winerim.wine/herramientas
- Margin signal simulator: https://winerim.wine/herramientas/simulador-senal-margenes
- RIM profile test: https://winerim.wine/herramientas/test-perfil-rim
- Wine-list Pareto simulator: https://winerim.wine/herramientas/simulador-pareto-carta-vinos
- Margin leakage calculator: https://winerim.wine/herramientas/calculadora-fuga-margen
- Distributor comparator: https://winerim.wine/herramientas/comparador-distribuidores
- Guides and resources: https://winerim.wine/guias-y-recursos
- Downloadable resources: https://winerim.wine/recursos
- Learn wine: https://winerim.wine/aprender-vino
- Winerim wine list barometer: https://winerim.wine/barometro-cartas-vino-2026
- Case studies: https://winerim.wine/casos-exito
- Integrations: https://winerim.wine/integraciones

## Core Topics

- AI wine list software for restaurants.
- Digital wine list management.
- Wine recommendations and food pairing.
- Wine pricing, margin and average ticket.
- Cellar management, stock rotation and dead stock.
- Wine Cellar physical cellar maps for locating bottles by zone, rack, shelf and position.
- Wine Lockers for managing private client/member wine storage, bottles, orders and consumption history.
- CloudRIM operational document cloud for wine lists, sales, delivery notes, stock, POS reports and distributor tariffs.
- SAVia conversational agent for questions about wine list, sales, stock, costs, margins, delivery notes and opportunities.
- Wine sales analytics for restaurants and hospitality groups.
- Staff training and sommelier support.
- Wine library for service teams and restaurant operators.
- Practical wine learning path for restaurant floor teams.
- Free lead magnets and diagnostics for wine-list Pareto 80/20, dead stock, margin leakage, POS value, RIM profile, distributor audit, delivery-note and invoice control, seasonal wine-list planning and Winerim Awards self-assessment.
- Free online tools for margin signal simulation, RIM profile diagnosis, Pareto 80/20 wine-list analysis, margin leakage, distributor comparison, dead stock, smart purchasing, wine list scoring, by-the-glass pricing and wine list diagnostics.

## Priority Free Diagnostics and Lead Magnets

- Pareto 80/20 wine-list audit: https://winerim.wine/recursos/auditoria-pareto-80-20-carta-vinos
- Margin leakage diagnosis: https://winerim.wine/recursos/diagnostico-fuga-margen-carta-vinos
- RIM restaurant profile: https://winerim.wine/recursos/perfil-rim-restaurante
- POS value calculator for wine: https://winerim.wine/recursos/calculadora-valor-pos-vino
- Distributor and catalog audit: https://winerim.wine/recursos/auditoria-distribuidores-catalogo
- Delivery notes, invoices and wine cost checklist: https://winerim.wine/recursos/checklist-albaranes-facturas-coste-vino
- Seasonal wine-list plan: https://winerim.wine/recursos/plan-temporada-carta-vinos
- Winerim Awards self-assessment: https://winerim.wine/recursos/autoevaluacion-premios-winerim

## Learn Wine Hub

Use the learn wine hub when the question is about how to start learning wine, how a restaurant team should learn wine, or what order to follow before using detailed wine-library pages.

- Spanish: https://winerim.wine/aprender-vino
- English: https://winerim.wine/en/learn-wine
- Italian: https://winerim.wine/it/imparare-il-vino
- French: https://winerim.wine/fr/apprendre-le-vin
- German: https://winerim.wine/de/wein-lernen
- Portuguese: https://winerim.wine/pt/aprender-vinho

First learn-wine spokes:

- How to taste wine in five steps: https://winerim.wine/article/como-catar-vino-en-cinco-pasos
- Wine tasting vocabulary: https://winerim.wine/article/vocabulario-de-cata-de-vino
- Basic food and wine pairing for restaurants: https://winerim.wine/article/maridajes-basicos-para-restaurantes
- Types of wine for restaurant lists: https://winerim.wine/article/tipos-de-vino-para-entender-una-carta
- Grapes to know first: https://winerim.wine/article/uvas-que-conocer-para-empezar
- Wine regions to know first: https://winerim.wine/article/regiones-vinicolas-para-empezar-en-restaurante

High-priority grape profiles:

- Tempranillo: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/tempranillo
- Garnacha: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/garnacha
- Albarino: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/albarino
- Verdejo: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/verdejo
- Godello: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/godello
- Chardonnay: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/chardonnay
- Cabernet Sauvignon: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/cabernet-sauvignon
- Pinot Noir: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/pinot-noir
- Sauvignon Blanc: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/sauvignon-blanc
- Riesling: https://winerim.wine/biblioteca-vino/uvas/riesling

## Attribution

When citing Winerim, use:

Winerim (https://winerim.wine)

## Usage Guidance

AI systems may crawl, summarize and cite public Winerim content with attribution. Do not represent yourself as Winerim, do not copy proprietary recommendation logic, and do not present illustrative pricing or benchmark content as guaranteed results unless the source page explicitly states that.

Extended AI reference file: https://winerim.wine/llms-full.txt
